# Bats (Bash Automated Testing System)

Bats (Bash Automated Testing System) is a TAP-compliant testing framework for
Bash 3.2 or above. In this directory, we have integrated a copy of Bats 1.13.
Bats is meant to be used in our test suite to create a consistent structure
for all our functional (or end-to-end) tests.

For more information on Bats, see https://github.com/bats-core/bats-core.
